signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst driving XRP's ~10% weekly gain to ~$1.42, breaking above $1.50 resistance and signaling a shift to institutional acceptance with bullish 2026 price targets up to $5[1][3][4].
